name: Jordan Rivera
body: I read that Northwind is rebuilding its billing pipeline, and that's the exact problem I spent the last two years on at Acme — moving a nightly batch that kept missing its window onto a streaming reconciliation job that now closes the books by 6am.

What I'd bring is less about tools and more about temperament: I like the unglamorous work of making a flaky system boring. At Acme I cut p95 latency 40% by rewriting the query layer, but the part I'm proud of is that nobody pages about it anymore.
I'd welcome the chance to talk about where your pipeline hurts and whether I can help.
